opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The side of my head is throbbing so badly I can't sleep, my scalp burns when I brush my hair, and my jaw aches terribly when I try to chew.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The headache is new and severe, nothing is helping, and now the jaw pain means she can't even eat properly, so she wants to know what is going on.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 5 days ago, came on new — she has never had a headache like this before
symptom_narrative.duration: constant for the last 5 days, worst at night
symptom_narrative.character: a severe throbbing pain on the right side of the head, around the temple
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: excruciating — bad enough that she can't sleep and simple painkillers do nothing
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the right side of her head, around the temple region
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there most of the time, keeps her awake at night, made worse by resting her head on the pillow
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really — paracetamol has given her no relief at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: brushing or touching her hair on that side, and lying with that side of her head on the pillow
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: her scalp on that side burns and is very tender when she brushes her hair, and her jaw aches and tires badly when she chews so she has stopped eating solid food; she also feels generally worn out and off
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no — she has never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: normally independent, but is very distressed, can't sleep, and can't eat solid food because of the jaw pain

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: taking it for the headache but it isn't helping at all

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; normally fully independent but currently distressed and unable to eat solid food or sleep because of the pain

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: mainly wants relief from the pain and to be able to eat and sleep; may not appreciate the seriousness or the threat to her eyesight

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the pain vividly and in detail, focused on the headache and jaw pain

access_barriers.transport: lives alone, no companion mentioned to help her get to hospital

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single self-taken reading on a home thermometer; low-grade only and not clinician-verified

objective_data_offered.value: the right temple area looks a bit prominent and is extremely tender to touch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-described/video appearance only; the artery cannot be properly palpated or assessed for pulse and nodularity over telehealth
